<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-diagnostic-docs.mjs. Do not edit. -->
# Diagnostic codes

ZPLr returns syntax and semantic failures plus safety-limit violations as structured diagnostics. Parameters with documented default or ignore behavior can remain silent. Operational failures from a host Canvas adapter or user-supplied callback/provider reject the render promise. Applications should branch on `code`, not on English message text.

The codes below are stable for the 0.3 API freeze: a 0.3.x release may add a code, but it will not remove a code or reinterpret its meaning. Severity, phase, source span, related spans, command identity, and label index provide additional context.

| Code | Phase | Stable meaning |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `EXPANDED_COMMAND_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | semantic | Stored-format expansion exceeded maxExpandedCommands. |
| `FALLBACK_LABEL_HEIGHT` | render | No explicit height or ^LL was available, so the configured fallback was used. |
| `FALLBACK_LABEL_WIDTH` | render | No explicit width or ^PW was available, so the configured fallback was used. |
| `FONT_SUBSTITUTED` | render | A requested font could not be resolved and deterministic Font 0 was used. |
| `GRAPHIC_BYTE_COUNT_MISMATCH` | semantic | Decoded or transmitted graphic bytes differ from the declared count. |
| `GRAPHIC_CRC_MISMATCH` | semantic | A wrapped graphic payload failed its declared CRC. |
| `GRAPHIC_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | semantic | A graphic or downloaded object exceeded maxGraphicBytes. |
| `IMPLICIT_LABEL` | parse | Format commands appeared outside an explicit ^XA/^XZ pair. |
| `INSUFFICIENT_STRUCTURED_APPEND_ORIGINS` | semantic | A structured symbol requested more segments than ^FM supplied origins for. |
| `INVALID_BARCODE_DATA` | render | Barcode field data or parameters cannot be encoded. |
| `INVALID_COMMAND` | parse | A command token is malformed. |
| `INVALID_COMMAND_PREFIX` | parse | A known command was used with the wrong ^ or ~ identity. |
| `INVALID_ENCODED_FIELD_DATA` | semantic | Field data cannot be decoded with the active encoding. |
| `INVALID_FIELD_VALUE_KEY` | semantic | A per-render ^FN override used an invalid field number or a non-string value. |
| `INVALID_GRAPHIC_BASE64` | semantic | A B64 graphic wrapper contains invalid Base64. |
| `INVALID_GRAPHIC_BINARY` | semantic | A binary graphic contains non-byte characters or a truncated payload. |
| `INVALID_GRAPHIC_COMPRESSION` | semantic | ASCII graphic compression is malformed. |
| `INVALID_GRAPHIC_DATA` | semantic | Graphic data cannot be decoded. |
| `INVALID_GRAPHIC_DIMENSIONS` | semantic | Graphic dimensions or row geometry are invalid. |
| `INVALID_GRAPHIC_HEX` | semantic | A graphic contains invalid hexadecimal data. |
| `INVALID_GRAPHIC_SYMBOL` | semantic | ^GS selected an unknown bundled symbol. |
| `INVALID_GRAPHIC_WRAPPER` | semantic | A B64 or Z64 wrapper is malformed. |
| `INVALID_GRAPHIC_ZLIB` | semantic | A compressed graphic cannot be inflated. |
| `INVALID_HEX_ESCAPE` | semantic | ^FH field data contains an invalid escape. |
| `INVALID_INPUT` | parse | The parser received an input value other than a string. |
| `INVALID_OBJECT_DATA` | semantic | A downloaded object or font payload is invalid. |
| `INVALID_QR_ALPHANUMERIC_DATA` | semantic | A QR alphanumeric segment contains a character outside its alphabet. |
| `INVALID_QR_BYTE_DATA` | semantic | A QR byte segment contains malformed byte data. |
| `INVALID_QR_BYTE_LENGTH` | semantic | A QR byte segment length differs from its declaration. |
| `INVALID_QR_CHARACTER_MODE` | semantic | A QR segment selected an invalid character mode. |
| `INVALID_QR_FIELD_DATA` | semantic | QR field data is malformed for the requested mode. |
| `INVALID_QR_NUMERIC_DATA` | semantic | A QR numeric segment contains non-decimal data. |
| `INVALID_QR_STRUCTURED_APPEND` | semantic | QR structured-append metadata is invalid. |
| `INVALID_SERIALIZATION_FIELD` | semantic | A ^SF mask and increment exceed the documented combined size limit. |
| `LABEL_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | render | Resolved label dimensions or a temporary field raster exceeded maxDimension, maxPixels, or the remaining render-call pixel budget. |
| `LABEL_QUANTITY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | semantic | ^PQ requested more output labels than maxLabels. |
| `MISSING_BARCODE_DATA` | semantic | A barcode field has no field data. |
| `MISSING_ENCODING_RESOURCE` | semantic | The selected downloaded encoding is not present in the session. |
| `MISSING_GRAPHIC_RESOURCE` | semantic | A referenced graphic is not present in the session. |
| `MISSING_PREFIX_PARAMETER` | parse | A syntax-prefix command omitted its replacement character. |
| `MISSING_STORED_FORMAT` | semantic | A recalled stored format is not present in the session. |
| `NESTED_FORMAT` | parse | A format definition appeared inside another format definition. |
| `NON_RENDERING_COMMAND` | parse | A recognized device-only command was intentionally raster-neutral. |
| `OBJECT_BYTE_COUNT_MISMATCH` | semantic | A downloaded object's decoded bytes differ from its declaration. |
| `PARTIALLY_SUPPORTED_COMMAND` | parse | The selected profile marks this command as partial. |
| `PREFIX_COLLISION` | parse | The active format and control prefix characters collide, so ambiguous commands are treated as format commands. |
| `RECURSIVE_STORED_FORMAT` | semantic | Stored-format expansion detected a recall cycle. |
| `RESERVED_POSTAL_BARCODE_TYPE` | semantic | ^BZ selected a reserved postal barcode type. |
| `SESSION_RESOURCE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | semantic | A download, format, transfer, or image save exceeded maxSessionBytes. |
| `STRUCTURED_APPEND_ENCODING_FAILED` | semantic | A structured barcode segment could not be encoded. |
| `TEMPLATE_DEPTH_EXCEEDED` | semantic | Stored-format recall exceeded maxTemplateDepth. |
| `TEXT_BLOCK_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | semantic | ^FB field data exceeded its documented 3 KiB layout limit. |
| `TEXT_OUTSIDE_COMMAND` | parse | Non-whitespace source text appeared outside a command. |
| `UNKNOWN_COMMAND` | parse | The full command identity is absent from the pinned profile. |
| `UNMATCHED_FORMAT_END` | parse | ^XZ appeared without a matching ^XA. |
| `UNSUPPORTED_CHARACTER_SET` | semantic | ^CI selected a character set outside the pinned profile. |
| `UNSUPPORTED_CODE128_MODE` | semantic | ^BC selected an unsupported mode. |
| `UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND` | parse | The selected profile recognizes but does not implement the command. |
| `UNSUPPORTED_FIELD_SELECTION` | semantic | A field-selection mode is outside the renderer profile. |
| `UNSUPPORTED_GRAPHIC_FORMAT` | semantic | A downloaded object uses an unsupported image format. |
| `UNSUPPORTED_PROFILE` | parse | The requested renderer profile is unavailable. |
| `UNSUPPORTED_QR_MODEL` | semantic | ^BQ selected an unsupported QR model. |
| `UNTERMINATED_FIELD` | semantic | Field data reached the end of its format without ^FS. |
| `UNTERMINATED_FORMAT` | parse | A ^XA format reached end of input without ^XZ. |
